suggested_rules: Corridor records whose corridor_name, street, limits (from/to), and routes_served/routes match exactly are the same canonical identity even when source_id and local_observation_id differ.
suggestion.rationale: Both records describe the same corridor: East Gun Hill Road from Bainbridge Avenue to Bartow Avenue, serving the same routes (Bx28, Bx30, Bx38). One uses 'limits' + 'routes_served' keys; the other uses 'street'/'from'/'to'/'routes' keys but all values are identical. The negative signal 'different or partially different limits' is not supported by the actual payload data (both have identical limits). The validator duplicate identity edge (score 100) confirms they share identity key 'corridor_east-gun-hill-rd'. No borough or station-area scope differs. Merge is warranted.
